mapper.select: SELECT * FROM user WHERE username = #{username} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM user WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM user WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user (username, password, nickname, avatar, email, phone, bio, role, status) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{avatar}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{bio}, #{role}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE user SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE user SET password = #{password} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE user SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
